scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:functions && next build && gh-pages -d out --nojekyll
scripts.deploy:functions: (cd backend && npx supabase functions deploy --project-ref oupxuaillphhvtdtmgih --no-verify-jwt send-contact-email && npx supabase functions deploy --project-ref oupxuaillphhvtdtmgih --no-verify-jwt confirm-email && npx supabase functions deploy --project-ref oupxuaillphhvtdtmgih --no-verify-jwt validate-email && npx supabase functions deploy --project-ref oupxuaillphhvtdtmgih --no-verify-jwt chat)
